additionalInfo.description: Process meeting transcripts with AI to extract action items, decisions, and generate formatted meeting minutes.

inputSchema.name: transcript
inputSchema.description: The raw meeting transcript or notes to process

configuration.prompt:
You are a meeting secretary. Analyze the following meeting transcript and extract structured information.

Return a JSON object with these fields:
- "title": a concise meeting title
- "date": the meeting date if mentioned, otherwise today's date
- "attendees": list of participants mentioned
- "agenda_items": list of topics discussed
- "decisions": list of decisions made
- "action_items": list of {"assignee": "...", "task": "...", "deadline": "..."}
- "key_discussion_points": list of important points raised
- "next_meeting": any mention of follow-up meetings

Transcript:
${msg}

additionalInfo.description: Use LLM to analyze transcript and extract structured meeting data
Format the extracted meeting data into Markdown
